_doc: === INFERENCE RESULT: Output of an async analysis job. Usually regenerable — optional layer. ===
_job_type: One of: MotivationInference, CausalDiscovery, Counterfactual, GameClassification, MissingLinks, AnomalyDetection, PatternMining, ArcClassification, MissingEventPrediction, CentralityAnalysis, EntropyAnalysis, BeliefModeling, EvidenceCombination, ArgumentationAnalysis, ContagionAnalysis, StyleProfile, StyleComparison, StyleAnomaly.
_target_id: UUID of the entity or situation this result pertains to.
_result: Arbitrary JSON — the actual analysis output. Structure varies by job_type.
explanation: NOTEARS algorithm identified strong causal link from harbor meeting to document analysis
_status: One of: Pending, Running, Completed, Failed.
